title.ko: 제트 추진 플랜트 (육상 차량 또는 차량에 제트 추진 플랜트 의 배치 또는 장착 일반 B60K; 수상 선박에서 제트 추진 설비의 배치 또는 장착 B63H; 제트 반응에 의한 항공기 자세, 비행 방향 또는 고도를 제어하는 것 B64C15/00, B64U50/10; 제트 추진과 다른 형태의 추진 간에 나누어지는 작동 유체의 힘에 특징이 있는 플랜트, 예. 프로펠러 F02B, F02C; 가스 터빈 플랜트, 공기 흡입 또는 공기 배출 제트 추진 플랜트의 연료 공급 제어에 공통되는 제트 추진 플랜트의 특징 F02C)
title.en: JET-PROPULSION PLANTS (arrangement or mounting of jet-propulsion plants in land vehicles or vehicles in general B60K;arrangement or mounting of jet-propulsion plants in waterborne vessels B63H;controlling aircraft attitude, flight direction or altitude by jet reaction B64C0015000000, B64U0050100000;arrangement or mounting of jet-propulsion plants in aircraft B64D0027000000, B64U0050100000;plants characterised by the power of the working fluid being divided between jet propulsion and another form of propulsion, e.g. propeller, F02B, F02C;features of jet-propulsion plants common to gas-turbine plants, air intakes or fuel supply control of air-breathing jet-propulsion plants F02C)

definition.ko: 파이프 또는 노즐에 특징이 있는 장치 F02K1/00, F02K9/80 압축기 또는 팬에 특징이 있는 장치 F02K3/00, F02K5/00 압축기 또는 팬이 없는 장치 F02K7/00 로켓기관설비 F02K9/00 제어 F02K1/15, F02K1/76, F02K7/00, F02K9/00 그 밖의 장치, 세부 F02K11/00

title.ko: 제트 파이프 또는 노즐의 형상 또는 배치에 특징이 있는 설비 그것에 특유한 제트 파이프 또는 노즐(로켓노즐 F02K 9/97)
title.en: Plants characterised by the form or arrangement of the jet pipe or nozzle; Jet pipes or nozzles peculiar thereto (rocket nozzles F02K0009970000)
Mounting of an exhaust cone in the jet pipe

title.ko: 제트 파이프 또는 노즐의 유효 영역을 바꾸는 것(유체 제트를 사용하여 제트 흐름에 영향을 주는 것 F02K1/30)
title.en: Varying effective area of jet pipe or nozzle  (by using fluid jets to influence the jet flow F02K0001300000)
by axially moving or transversely deforming an internal member, e.g. the exhaust cone

title.ko: 외측부재의 축방향으로 이동에 의하는 것, 예. 슈라우드(shroud)(F02K 1/12이 우선)
title.en: by axially moving an external member, e.g. a shroud (F02K0001120000 takes precedence)
by distorting the jet pipe or nozzle
by means of pivoted eyelids
by means of pivoted flaps
Control or regulation
conjointly with another control
with control of fuel supply
automatic
using fluid jets to influence the jet flow
for varying effective area of jet pipe or nozzle
for reversing thrust
for attenuating noise
having an ejector

title.ko: 제트의 내부에 공기를 도입하는 것
title.en: Introducing air inside the jet (F02K0001280000 takes precedence)
Nozzles having means for dividing the jet into a plurality of partial jets or having an elongated cross-section outlet
the means being movable into an inoperative position

title.ko: 특정방향으로 음의 방사를 감소시키는 수단을 갖는 노즐(F02K 1/40이 우선)
title.en: Nozzles having means, e.g. a shield, reducing sound radiation in a specified direction (F02K0001400000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 제트에 공기를 가하기 위한 또는 제트와 주위의 공기와의 혼합물을 추가하기 위한 수단이 있는 노즐, 예. 소음을 위한 것(F02K 1/28, 1/36, 1/38이 우선)
title.en: Nozzles having means for adding air to the jet or for augmenting the mixing region between the jet and the ambient air, e.g. for silencing (F02K0001280000, F02K0001360000, F02K0001380000 take precedence)
Corrugated nozzles
Deflecting outwardly a portion of the jet by retractable scoop-like baffles
Nozzles specially constructed for positioning adjacent to another nozzle or to a fixed member, e.g. fairing

title.ko: 제트 추력을 역전시키기 위한 수단을 가지는 노즐(유체 제트를 사용한 역 제트 추력 F02K1/32)
title.en: Nozzles having means for reversing jet thrust  (reversing jet thrust using fluid jets F02K0001320000)
Reversing jet main flow
Reversers mounted on the inner cone or the nozzle housing
by blocking the rearward discharge by means of pivoted eyelids or clamshells, e.g. target-type reversers
by blocking the rearward discharge by means of flaps
Reversing fan flow
using reversing fan blades
Reversers mounted on the engine housing downstream of the fan exhaust section
using thrust reverser flaps or doors mounted on the fan housing
the aft end of the fan housing being movable to uncover openings in the fan housing for the reversed flow
Reversing at least one flow in relation to at least one other flow in a plural-flow engine
Control or regulation of thrust reversers
Other construction of jet pipes
Couplings or connections
Jet pipe walls, e.g. liners

title.ko: 압축기 또는 덕트팬(ducted fan)을 구동하는 가스터빈이 있는 장치
title.en: Plants including a gas turbine driving a compressor or a ducted fan
in which part of the working fluid by-passes the turbine and combustion chamber
the plant including ducted fans, i.e. fans with high volume, low-pressure outputs, for augmenting jet thrust, e.g. of double-flow type
with front fan
with aft fan
with front and aft fans
being characterised by a short axial length relative to diameter
with counter-rotating rotors
controlling flow ratio between flows
the plant being of the multiple flow type, i.e. having three or more flows

title.ko: 동작 유체의 추가 가열을 가지는 것; 그것의 제어(그를 위한 연료 공급의 제어 F02C 9/26)
title.en: with supplementary heating of the working fluid; Control thereof (control of fuel supply therefor F02C0009260000)

title.ko: 애프터 버너에 의한 것(F02K 3/105가 우선)
title.en: by after-burners (F02K0003105000 takes precedence)
Heating the by-pass flow
by means of burners or combustion chambers
by means of indirect heat exchange
characterised by having more than one gas turbine
Plants including an engine, other than a gas turbine, driving a compressor or a ducted fan
the engine being of the reciprocating-piston type

title.ko: 유동유체가 분사에만 사용되는 설비, 즉 압축기 또는 택티드 팬을 구동하는 터빈 또는 그 밖의 기관이 없는 설비; 그 제어(로켓엔진 F02K 9/00)
title.en: Plants in which the working-fluid is used in a jet only, i.e. the plants not having a turbine or other engine driving a compressor or a ducted fan; Control thereof (rocket-engine plants F02K0009000000)
the jet being intermittent, i.e. pulse jet
with resonant combustion chambers
with combustion chambers having valves
having aerodynamic valves
with multiple pulse-jet engines
the jet being continuous
characterised by having ram-action compression, i.e. aero-thermo-dynamic-ducts or ram-jet engines
Injection-induction jet engines
with external combustion, e.g. scram-jet engines
Composite ram-jet/turbo-jet engines
Composite ram-jet/rocket engines
Composite ram-jet/pulse-jet engines

title.ko: 로켓 엔진 설비, 즉. 연료와 그 산화제 양쪽을 운반하는 설비; 그것의 제어
title.en: Rocket-engine plants, i.e. plants carrying both fuel and oxidant therefor; Control thereof

title.ko: 고체의 추진제를 사용하는 것(F02K 9/72이 우선; 반고체 또는 분상의 추진제를 사용하는 것, F02K 9/70)
title.en: using solid propellants (F02K0009720000 takes precedence;using semi-solid or pulverulent propellants F02K0009700000)
Shape or structure of solid propellant charges
made of two or more portions burning at different rates
made from sheet-like materials, e.g. of carpet-roll type, of layered structure
of honeycomb structure
of the internal-burning type having a star or like shaped internal cavity
of the external-burning type
of the front-burning type
Charging rocket engines with solid propellants; Methods or apparatus specially adapted for working solid propellant charges
Burning control
having two or more propellant charges with the propulsion gases exhausting through a common nozzle
with the propulsion gases exhausting through a plurality of nozzles
Constructional parts; Details not otherwise provided for
Casings; Combustion chambers; Liners thereof
Propellant charge supports
Safety devices, e.g. to prevent accidental ignition
Cooling arrangements

title.ko: 유체 또는 기체의 추진제을 사용하는 것(F02K 9/72이 우선)
title.en: using liquid or gaseous propellants (F02K0009720000 takes precedence)
Feeding propellants
using pumps
driven by a gas turbine fed by propellant combustion gases
using pressurised fluid to pressurize the propellants
Injectors
Leakage detectors; Purging systems; Filtration systems
Control
Propellant feed valves
Constructional parts; Details not otherwise provided for
Combustion or thrust chambers
having cooling arrangements
of the rotary type
Decomposition chambers
using semi-solid or pulverulent propellants
using liquid and solid propellants, i.e. hybrid rocket-engine plants

title.ko: 타의 제트추진설비와의 조합
title.en: combined with another jet-propulsion plant
with another rocket-engine plant; Multistage rocket-engine plants

title.ko: 공기흡입 제트추진설비와이 조합(램 제트 엔진과의 조합 F02K 7/18)
title.en: with an air-breathing jet-propulsion plant (with a ram-jet engine F02K0007180000)

title.ko: 추력 또는 추력 벡터 제어를 특징으로 하는 것 (고체 추진제의 연소 제어 F02K9/26; 액체 또는 기체 추진제의 공급 제어 F02K9/56; 재점화, 재가동 또는 간헐적으로 작동되는 로켓 엔진 플랜트 F02K9/94)
title.en: characterised by thrust or thrust vector control  (burning control of solid propellants F02K0009260000;feeding control of liquid or gaseous propellants F02K0009560000;re-ignitable, restartable or intermittently operated rocket-engine plants F02K0009940000)
by injection of a secondary fluid into the rocket exhaust gases
using movable nozzles
using nozzle throats of adjustable cross-section
using auxiliary rocket nozzles

title.ko: 편향장치를 사용하는 것(F02K 9/82이 우선)
title.en: using deflectors (F02K0009820000 takes precedence)
incorporating means for reversing or terminating thrust
Re-ignitable or restartable rocket-engine plants; Intermittently operated rocket-engine plants

title.ko: 시동 또는 점화수단 또는 장치에 의해서 특징지어진 것(안전장치 F02K 9/38)
title.en: characterised by starting or ignition means or arrangements (safety devices F02K0009380000)
characterised by specially adapted arrangements for testing or measuring

title.ko: 로켓 노즐(추력 또는 추력궤도의 제어 F02K 9/80)
title.en: Rocket nozzles (thrust or thrust vector control F02K0009800000)
Subject matter not provided for in other groups of this subclass
